case_title: BOLANOS, JUAN CARLOS et al vs. ASBILL, NANCY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOLANOS, JUAN CARLOS BOLANOS, LESVIA AS TO DEFENDANT ASBILL, NANCY DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-09-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-10-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-19-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-09-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-08-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-08-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-08-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED ON PLTF'S ATTY., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-10-1995 CONTINUED FROM JUN-08-1995 TO JUL-10-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-10-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-10-1995, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO TIMELY PROSECUTE MATTER., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-01-1995 CONTINUED FROM JUL-10-1995 TO AUG-09-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-09-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND OSC, TO ALLOW ATTORNEY OF RECORD TO WITHDRAW, OR WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER APPROPRIATE ACTION. HEARING SET FOR SEP-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF BOLANOS, JUAN CARLOS BOLANOS, LESVIA

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-12-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), FOR ENTRY OF SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, WITH A PROOF OF SERVICE. CURRENT COUNSEL TO LET PLAINTIFF KNOW HE IS NOW REPRESENTING HIMSELF, AND WILL BE HELD TO THE SAME STANDARDS AS AN ATTORNEY, ETC. (FAILURE OF THE PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR WILL RESULT IN APPROPRIATE ACTION, SUCH AS DISMISSAL OF ACTION, FOR FAILURE TO PROSECUTE CASE) HEARING SET FOR SEP-26-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOLANOS, JUAN CARLOS BOLANOS, LESVIA SERVED SEP-24-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ASBILL, NANCY

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-26-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE 5TH OSC: FOR PLAINTIFF TO SHOW WHY THERE IS NO SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, THE $50.00 SANCTIONS ARE TO BE POSTED NO LATER THAN 10/15/95. HEARING SET FOR OCT-26-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ASBILL, NANCY
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ASBILL, NANCY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-26-1995, OFF CALENDAR
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF BOLANOS, JUAN CARLOS
